results.title: Vishnu Priya files police complaint against channel over alleged defamatory content
results.description: South actress Vishnu Priya has lodged a police complaint in Hyderabad accusing YouTube channel “Play Like Incognito” of spreading false, sensational, and damaging content about her personal and professional life, leading to online harassment and reputational harm.

results.title: Government Approves Space Tech Testing Facilities In Gujarat And Tamil Nadu
results.description: The Indian Government has approved the establishment of Common Technical Facilities to test space technology in Gujarat and Tamil Nadu, a move that underscores the country’s ambition to build a robust, industry-led space ecosystem.These facilities will be equipped with advanced testing, validation, and integration infrastructure, designed to support domestic manufacturing in the space sector.The

results.title: India Unveils STRYKER, Jet-Powered Kamikaze UAV With Unmatched Speed And Lethality
results.description: NextLeap Aeronautics has unveiled STRYKER, India’s fastest and most lethal jet-powered kamikaze UAV, marking a breakthrough in indigenous unmanned strike technology. results.title: Breakthrough Optical Technique At IIT-Bombay Enhances Semi-Cryogenic Engine Development
results.description: A significant step has been taken towards the development of efficient semi-cryogenic rocket engines through a collaborative project between the Department of Mechanical Engineering at IIT-Bombay and the Liquid Propulsion Systems Centre (LPSC) of ISRO, Trivandrum, announced IIT-Bombay X handle.Cryogenic engines are widely used in the upper stages of launch vehicles due to their higher specific

results.title: Armenia Deepens Artillery Partnership With India Through School of Artillery Visit
results.description: Armenia has intensified its defence partnership with India by sending a high-level military delegation to the School of Artillery in Deolali, Maharashtra, where discussions and demonstrations focused on deepening cooperation in artillery training, capability development, and operational readiness.This visit underscores Armenia’s growing reliance on Indian defence systems amid its search for

results.title: SC grants six-month interim bail to Tasleem Ahmed, Khalid Saifi in Delhi riots larger conspiracy case
results.description: New Delhi, May 22, 2026 The Supreme Court on Friday granted six months’ interim bail to Delhi riots accused Tasleem Ahmed and Khalid Saifi in the larger conspiracy case under the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act (UAPA), while referring to a larger bench the question of whether prolonged incarceration and delay in trial can justify the [...] The post SC grants six-month interim bail to Tasleem Ahmed, Khalid Saifi in Delhi riots larger conspiracy case appeared first on Yes Punjab News .

results.title: ‘Bots, AI, propaganda’: Rajeev Chandrasekhar says Cockroach Party is foreign influence operation
results.description: Kerala BJP chief Rajeev Chandrasekhar labels the viral 'Cockroach Janata Party' trend a foreign influence operation. Read the full analysis on digital security.

results.title: Realme 16T Launched in India with Massive 8000mAh Battery and 144Hz Display
results.description: Realme 16T launched in India with a massive 8000mAh battery, 144Hz display, Dimensity 6300 chipset, 50MP AI camera, and 45W fast charging, starting at ₹29,999.

results.title: Anti-Narcotics Police Station Arrests Local Co-Accused in 6.330 Kg Ganja Seizure Case
results.description: Sri Vijaya Puram | May 23, 2026 Continuing its aggressive crackdown against narcotics trafficking and drug networks, the Anti-Narcotics Police Station of Andaman and Nicobar Police has achieved another significant breakthrough by arresting a local-based co-accused in connection with Anti-Narcotics Police Station FIR No. 08/2026 dated 17.04.2026 registered under Sections 20(b)(ii)(B)/29 of the NDPS Act, [...] The post Anti-Narcotics Police Station Arrests Local Co-Accused in 6.330 Kg Ganja Seizure Case appeared first on Nicobar Times .

results.title: Jupiter Transit in Cancer 2026 for Pisces(Meena) Ascendant: Career, fortune and growth
results.description: On June 2, 2026, Jupiter's move into Cancer marks a significant period for Pisces ascendants. This transit strengthens Jupiter, ruling both their self and career, while influencing their 5th house of personal growth, creativity, and children. The combined influence of Jupiter and Saturn on the ascendant emphasizes disciplined, structured growth and increased responsibility.

results.title: World Bank says responding to Ebola outbreak, plans to increase funding
results.description: World Bank plans increased funding and resources to combat the Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo and neighboring regions.
